changelog:
First PixelMask release.

- Forked from BaltiApps/Pixelify-Google-Photos and rebuilt on a modern stack: Kotlin 2.2, Jetpack Compose, Material 3 dynamic colors
- Spoof internals migrated to YukiHookAPI 1.3.1 + KavaRef 1.0.2
- New launcher icon (Bugdroid silhouette + 4-blade pinwheel, monochrome themed-icon support)
- New package coordinate: com.kinginu.pixelmask
- compileSdk / targetSdk 36, minSdk 26
